response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise for the role, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level positions that far exceed the junior entry-level scope, raising concerns about role fit and salary expectations.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Proven agility in diverse tech stacks and agile environments
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting required fluency
No demonstrated professional Java project experience despite listing it as a skill
Senior-level roles and overqualification make junior fit unlikely
